name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ Gold Butterfly Five-Grid Embroidery ✨
 This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable flair. Adorned throughout with white and pale green Butterfly Around The World embroidery designed by Pietro Ruffo, highlighting the classic beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a removable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or worn crossbody.
Model: D6814, Dimensions: 24 x 20 x 11cm, 📸 Exclusive real-life photos 🎞✨ Comes with original packaging gift box 🎁]
